inputText: Dear customer, electricity connection will be disconnected at 9:30 PM tonight because your previous month bill was not updated. Call electricity officer 90012-34567 immediately.
explanation: AI service is temporarily unavailable. The message may be suspicious. Avoid clicking unknown links and verify the sender's identity directly.

inputText: Dear customer, your bank account is suspended due to pending KYC verification. Please call bank manager at 98765-43210 immediately to update.
explanation: AI service is temporarily unavailable. The message may be suspicious. Avoid clicking unknown links and verify the sender's identity directly.

inputText: Congratulations! You have won Rs. 25 Lakhs. Send bank account and OTP to WhatsApp 88776-55443 to claim prize. Click http://fake-prize.in now!
explanation: This message is a dangerous scam designed to steal your money and personal information. No legitimate organization will ever ask you to share your bank account details or OTP via WhatsApp to claim a prize. The promise of winning a large sum of money like Rs. 25 Lakhs is a common trick used by fraudsters to lure you into sharing your financial credentials. Do not click the link, do not reply to the message, and do not share any OTPs with anyone. Please delete this message immediately and block the sender to protect your bank account.

inputText: Congratulations! You have won Rs. 25 Lakhs from KBC Lucky Draw. Send bank account details and photo to WhatsApp 88776-55443 to claim your prize.
explanation: This is a classic phishing scam. Legitimate organizations like KBC do not conduct lucky draws via unsolicited SMS, nor do they ask for sensitive bank account details or personal photos via WhatsApp. Sharing your bank details and personal identity documents can lead to severe financial loss and identity theft. Do not reply to this message, do not send any information, and block the sender immediately.

inputText: Congratulations! You have won Rs. 25 Lakhs from KBC Lucky Draw. Send bank account details and photo to WhatsApp 88776-55443 to claim your prize.
explanation: આ એક સ્પષ્ટ છેતરપિંડી (Scam) છે. KBC કે અન્ય કોઈ પણ લોટરી જીતવા માટે ક્યારેય બેંક વિગતો કે વ્યક્તિગત માહિતી માંગવામાં આવતી નથી. અજાણ્યા નંબર પર તમારી બેંક વિગતો કે ફોટા ક્યારેય મોકલશો નહીં, કારણ કે આ તમારી સાથે નાણાકીય છેતરપિંડી કરવા માટેનો પ્રયાસ છે. કૃપા કરીને આ મેસેજને ડિલીટ કરો અને આ નંબરને બ્લોક કરો.

inputText: Congratulations! You have won Rs. 25 Lakhs from KBC Lucky Draw. Send bank account details and photo to WhatsApp 88776-55443 to claim your prize.
explanation: यह एक स्पष्ट धोखाधड़ी (Scam) है। KBC या किसी भी लॉटरी के नाम पर पैसे जीतने का दावा करने वाले संदेश हमेशा फर्जी होते हैं। कोई भी वैध संस्था आपसे WhatsApp पर बैंक विवरण या व्यक्तिगत फोटो नहीं मांगती है। अपनी बैंक जानकारी साझा करने से आपके खाते से पैसे चोरी हो सकते हैं। कृपया इस नंबर को ब्लॉक करें और इस संदेश का उत्तर न दें।

inputText: Congratulations! You have won Rs. 25 Lakhs from KBC Lucky Draw. Send bank account details and photo to WhatsApp 88776-55443 to claim your prize.
explanation: This is a classic financial fraud attempt. Legitimate organizations like KBC do not conduct lucky draws via SMS, nor do they ask for sensitive bank account details or personal photos via WhatsApp. Sharing your bank details and identity documents can lead to unauthorized access to your funds and identity theft. Do not reply to this message, do not send any information, and block the sender immediately.

inputText: Congratulations! You have won a lottery of 25 lakhs. Click here to claim your prize.
explanation: This message is a classic phishing scam. Legitimate lotteries do not notify winners via unsolicited SMS, and they never require you to click a link to claim a prize. Scammers use large sums of money like '25 lakhs' to create excitement and urgency. Clicking the link could lead to a malicious website designed to steal your personal information or bank details. Do not click the link, do not share any personal information, and delete the message immediately.
